news.headline: Ketryx impacts 20M+ patients in MedTech with new advancements & milestones; key achievements in 2024.
news.summary: Ketryx, a prominent company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, recently highlighted its significant progress in 2024. As a leader in connected lifecycle management for safety-critical sectors, Ketryx revealed new AI capabilities and achieved important milestones with its customers. This development has propelled the company forward, setting the stage for further success. The advancements were announced on January 9, 2025, demonstrating Ketryx's commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: OptionMetrics and CRSP partner to integrate U.S. equities and options data, benefiting academic researchers.
news.summary: In both New York and Chicago, OptionMetrics and CRSP have joined forces to enhance the integration of data related to U.S. equities and options, specifically aimed at academic research. This collaboration will result in improved accessibility and analysis of market information crucial for academic studies. The effort is expected to offer scholars a comprehensive dataset for research purposes, ultimately facilitating deeper insights into the financial markets. By combining their resources, OptionMetrics and CRSP are working towards providing a more comprehensive understanding of U.S. equities and options data.

news.headline: Apollo's Zelter predicts barriers between public and private markets will lower.
Alphabet CEO reveals AI generates 25% of Google's new code, stock rose in 2024, but faces AI competition and antitrust issues.
news.summary: In 2024, Google's stock experienced significant growth, despite facing competition from AI-powered rivals in the search engine industry and ongoing antitrust investigations by the Department of Justice. The CEO of Alphabet revealed that artificial intelligence is responsible for generating 25% of new code at Google. Investors are questioning whether Google's stock is a smart purchase amidst these challenges.

news.headline: Bitcoin price drops to $93K as ETF outflows increase, impacting cryptocurrency market. Read more on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Stay updated on the most recent cryptocurrency prices and updates. Bitcoin has dropped to $93,000 due to outflows from ETFs. For more information, visit Investor's Business Daily for detailed insights.

news.headline: Health tracking trend shifting to smart rings from watches, Oura leading market. Smart rings popular at CES 2025.
news.summary: At CES 2025, smart rings emerged as a popular consumer electronics category. The transition from watches to smart rings for health tracking is evident, with Oura leading the market. The shift signifies the increasing popularity of smart rings in the market, with a significant rise in exhibitors showcasing these devices. This move highlights a trend towards innovative wearable technology, emphasizing the growing importance of health tracking among consumers.

news.headline: Palantir stock soared 340% in 2024, mainly after Trump's win. In 2025, it faces challenges. Buy or sell?
news.summary: In 2024, the stock of PLTR surged by 340%, predominantly following Trump's election victory, as expectations for increased government AI automation bolstered investor confidence. However, in the initial stages of 2025, Palantir encountered challenges leading to doubts about its performance. Questions arise regarding whether PLTR stock is a prudent investment option given its lofty valuation.

news.headline: Worst fire in LA history affects stock market; utility and insurance stocks react. Check on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The recent Palisades fire in Los Angeles is now recorded as the most devastating in the city's history. The event has caused a significant reaction in utility and insurance sectors within the stock market. These sectors are observing fluctuations in response to the fire's impact.

news.headline: Announcement of Deputy Chair and board members being nominated, adding freshness with new leadership. (Character count: 87)
Alm. Brand issues Tier-1 bonds worth $100 million.
Clean Juice launches promotion with 20-cent organic juice until Jan 31, 2025, to make healthy habits accessible.
news.summary: A nationally recognized USDA-certified organic juice bar franchise named Clean Juice, is currently providing customers with a chance to buy discounted cold-pressed juices until January 31st, 2025. This initiative aims to make healthy habits more accessible to the public. Clean Juice franchise has gained prominence for its commitment to offering organic products, and this limited-time offer presents an opportunity for customers to experience their offerings at a reduced price.

news.headline: Supermicro is shipping servers with Intel Xeon 6900 Series processors for AI, HPC, virtualization, and edge workloads, featuring next-gen GPU support, 400GbE networking, and more.
news.summary: The latest Intel® Xeon® 6900 Series processors with P-Cores optimized for superior performance are now being shipped in bulk on completely revamped servers. These upgraded servers come with next-gen GPU support, increased memory bandwidth, 400GbE networking capabilities, as well as support for E1.S and E3.S drives. This advanced technology is aimed at delivering industry-leading performance and efficiency.

news.headline: International Isotopes, Inc. has finalized the Acquisition of AMICI, Inc. Product Line after amending the agreement.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Idaho Falls, International Isotopes Inc. (OTCQB: INIS) confirmed the adjustment of the Asset Purchase Agreement with AMICI, Inc., originally agreed upon on June 16, 2023. The company made amendments to address certain issues, potentially related to financial considerations or regulatory compliance, in anticipation of an upcoming transition or expansion. This move underscores International Isotopes' commitment to fostering positive partnerships and ensuring the smooth operation of its business.

news.headline: YouCopia® expands into bathroom storage, offering innovative products combining functionality with style. 15th anniversary milestone reached.
news.summary: Chicago, January 9, 2025 - YouCopia has introduced a new product line that aims to bring tranquility and cleanliness to daily personal care routines. The company, known for revolutionizing kitchen organization, has released a series of innovative products that combine functionality and style. This launch coincides with YouCopia's 15th anniversary, marking a significant milestone for the brand.

news.headline: Exabeam appoints Craig Patterson as Global Channel Chief to expand partnerships and collaboration worldwide.
news.summary: Exabeam, a prominent cybersecurity company known for AI-driven security operations, has recently named Craig Patterson as the Global Channel Chief. In his new role, Patterson will be responsible for spearheading initiatives aimed at promoting innovation and cooperation within the channel network. This includes bolstering go-to-market strategies and broadening the company's presence through key partnerships in regions such as North America, Europe, LATAM, iMETA, and APAC. Patterson brings with him significant experience in the channel industry, making him a valuable addition to Exabeam's leadership team.

news.headline: Nirrin Technologies forms Scientific Advisory Board with leaders in biomanufacturing and therapeutic development in Billerica.
news.summary: A Scientific Advisory Board has been formed by Nirrin Technologies in Billerica, Massachusetts, comprising experts from various fields related to biomanufacturing and advanced therapeutic development. The board consists of a diverse group of professionals who will provide guidance and expertise in these areas.

news.headline: Diligent named top ERM solution provider by Wheelhouse Advisors per 2024 IRM Navigator report. Leading in integrated platform.
news.summary: In New York, Diligent, a prominent GRC SaaS company, has reinforced its dominant role as an “Integrator” in the 2024 IRM Navigator™ Quarterly Insight Report – ERM Edition by Wheelhouse Advisors. This report, a key reference for assessing Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) solutions in the wider Integrated Risk Management (IRM) field, underscores Diligent's strong performance in providing an integrated platform linking ERM with governance and compliance. This recognition underscores the company's leadership, emphasizing its ability to connect various risk management aspects.

news.headline: Cohesity, leader in AI-powered data security, expands CERT service with IR vendor partnerships to enhance cyber resilience.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Cohesity, a top AI-powered data security company, has revealed the expansion of its Cohesity Cyber Event Response Team (CERT) service. This enhancement involves collaborations with prominent incident response (IR) vendors. Established in 2021, the skilled Cohesity CERT team brings years of specialized incident response experience and has notably supported many clients in swiftly addressing and bouncing back from critical security incidents. The move to partner with leading IR vendors, including Palo Alto Networks, marks a significant step for Cohesity.

news.headline: 56% of financial advisors may invest in crypto by 2025 due to the election: Bitwise/VettaFi Survey. $12 billion client assets.
news.summary: Bitwise Asset Management and VettaFi, two prominent companies in the financial sector, have recently launched their seventh annual survey on financial advisors' attitudes towards crypto assets. This survey, conducted after the 2024 U.S. election, is highly anticipated and sheds light on the growing interest in crypto among advisors. With Bitwise managing over $12 billion in client assets, the insights from this survey are valuable for understanding the evolving perspectives on crypto investments.

news.headline: CEO Robert M. Lee of Dragos Inc. to discuss cybersecurity resiliency at World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland.
news.summary: --(BUSINESS WIRE)--In an announcement today, Dragos Inc., a prominent figure in operational technology cybersecurity, shared that its CEO and Co-founder, Robert M. Lee, will be speaking at the World Economic Forum (WEF) Annual Meeting in Davos, Switzerland. The session titled "Cutting through Cyber Complexity" will focus on the challenges posed by increasing cyberattacks, geopolitical uncertainties, and rapid technological advancements that can impact an organization's resilience. Lee's participation at this prestigious event highlights the importance of addressing these issues.

news.headline: Kraken offers FTX creditors up to $50K in fee credits for zero-fee crypto trading, aligning with FTX fund distribution.
news.summary: Kraken, a reputable cryptocurrency exchange based in Cheyenne, Wyoming, recently revealed a new initiative for clients receiving funds from FTX on their platform. New clients will be granted fee credits, enabling them to purchase up to $50,000 worth of cryptocurrency without incurring any trading fees. In December, Kraken was chosen as a partner for distributing funds to previous FTX clients. The payouts will be in U.S. dollars, prompting Kraken to aim for minimal transaction costs.

news.headline: Citrix commits to enhancing security and value for customers with advanced solutions in today's digital world.
news.summary: Citrix, a division of Cloud Software Group, Inc., has reaffirmed its dedication to providing customers with cutting-edge secure solutions in the rapidly evolving digital landscape. The company announced today its ongoing efforts to enhance its CitrixⓇ platform, ensuring improved security measures for users. By investing in advancements, Citrix aims to offer enhanced value and security, equipping customers to effectively operate in a hybrid environment. Notably, Citrix has committed to FedRAMP High standards, underscoring its focus on delivering top-notch security for its users.

news.headline: Iodine Software joins Coalition for Health AI in Texas, aims to develop best practices for health AI.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Iodine Software, a prominent healthcare enterprise AI software company, revealed its recent membership in the Coalition for Health AI (CHAI). This private sector coalition focuses on establishing industry best practices and frameworks to promote innovation, safety, and security in health AI. Iodine Software, known for its AI-driven mid-revenue cycle solutions, emphasizes the importance of developing transformative technology while prioritizing safety. This move demonstrates the company's dedication to advancing the healthcare AI sector.

news.headline: WorkJam introduces Shift Bidding for fair scheduling in complex environments.
news.summary: In Montreal, WorkJam has introduced a new Shift Bidding feature aimed at enhancing scheduling fairness in unionized workplaces and other intricate settings. This new feature is set to revolutionize the way shifts are allocated, ensuring a more equitable distribution of work hours.

news.headline: FDA clears Heidelberg Engineering's ANTERION platform's Epithelial Thickness Module, enhancing corneal health assessment.
news.summary: Heidelberg Engineering, a renowned name in ophthalmic imaging and healthcare data solutions, has recently received FDA clearance for their Epithelial Thickness Module. This module is exclusively accessible through the ANTERION Cornea App and offers eye care professionals cutting-edge thickness mapping and data insights for evaluating epithelial and stromal structures. With intricate parameters and color maps, this innovative module aims to aid in supporting refractive evaluations.

news.headline: Relias acquires Feedtrail HealthcareXM to boost workforce solutions with patient feedback capabilities, enhancing patient and employee experience.
news.summary: Relias, based in Morrisville, North Carolina, recently acquired Feedtrail HealthcareXM, a firm known for its expertise in patient and employee experience, as well as reputation management services. This acquisition marks an important milestone for Relias as it expands its portfolio to further enhance customer experience.

news.headline: Omdia highlights Nokod Security for innovating in low-code/no-code app security due to rising LCNC adoption.
news.summary: A technology vendor based in New York and Tel Aviv, Israel, is being recognized for its offerings by Omdia. The rise in Low-Code/No-Code (LCNC) adoption is leading to a growing need for the technology provided by this vendor. Omdia emphasizes the importance of this technology due to the emergence of "shadow engineering".

news.headline: MicroStrategy (Nasdaq: MSTR) achieves AWS Competencies in Government and Education for delivering quality solutions.
news.summary: MicroStrategy® Incorporated, a leading provider of AI-driven business intelligence software traded on Nasdaq under MSTR, revealed that it has secured the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Competences in Government and Education. This certification acknowledges MicroStrategy as an accomplished AWS Partner that has fulfilled AWS’s criteria by showcasing expertise in offering top-notch solutions to aid agencies in fulfilling mandates and achieving cost reductions, operational efficiencies, and fostering innovation.

news.headline: iATL celebrates five years as the first lab connecting automakers, cellular operators, and DOTs for 50 projects.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, the Infrastructure Automotive Technology Laboratory (iATL™) is marking its fifth year as the pioneering tech lab that unites automotive manufacturers, cellular network operators, traffic technology firms, semiconductor makers, and Departments of Transportation for the advancement of connected vehicle applications. iATL™ has spearheaded over 50 connected vehicle projects, including the recent development of crucial technologies.

news.headline: Hengdian Group Capital and Apeloa Pharmaceutical to join 2025 J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco. CEO and VP to attend.
news.summary: At the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco from January 13-16, 2025, Hengdian Group Capital (HgC) and Apeloa Pharmaceutical, both subsidiaries of Hengdian Group, are set to participate. HgC CEO Gary Xu and Apeloa VP George Cai will represent the companies at the event. This significant gathering will bring together key players in the healthcare industry, allowing for valuable discussions and networking opportunities.

news.headline: Nintendo Download features new game "Blade Chimera" for pre-order, where players control demon hunter Shin with shapeshifting sword.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, the latest Nintendo Download features new content for pre-ordering. One of the highlights is Blade Chimera, a game where players assume the role of Shin, a demon hunter devoid of his past memories. Teaming up with Lux, a shapeshifting demon capable of manipulating time and transforming into a sword, players embark on a journey to uncover the mysteries surrounding their past and loved ones. The unique blade in the game can not only defeat enemies but also alter time, allowing for the restoration of previously destroyed structures like stairs, bridges, and platforms.

news.headline: Baptist Health International partners with Cayman Islands HSA to enhance healthcare in Caribbean. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: A newly formed collaboration is enhancing educational and clinical training options for health professionals in the Cayman Islands. Baptist Health International (BHI), a segment of Baptist Health South Florida, has partnered with the Cayman Islands Health Services Authority. This partnership, established on January 9, 2025, aims to provide enhanced opportunities for professional development in the healthcare sector. The initiative is set to benefit a significant number of health professionals in the Cayman Islands by offering access to advanced training and educational resources.

news.headline: BlueSnap chosen as payment partner by MarginEdge, provider of restaurant management solutions in North America. #B2B #payment #partnership
news.summary: BlueSnap, a worldwide payment orchestration platform catering to top B2B and B2C enterprises, has been chosen by MarginEdge, a company offering restaurant management services, as its client billing partner in North America. MarginEdge assists restaurant owners and managers in streamlining their operations, allowing them to shift focus from the back office to the restaurant floor through automation. The platform offers a range of solutions for restaurant management, such as inventory management.

news.headline: METIS Intelligence secures new funding round led by Tau Capital to drive U.S. market expansion.
news.summary: A renowned company, METIS Intelligence, specialized in NextGen AI-driven intelligence and law enforcement solutions, recently completed a significant funding round on January 9, 2025. The funding was led by Tau Capital, a UAE-based firm. This investment will play a crucial role in facilitating METIS' expansion endeavors.

news.headline: Mapbox & Hyundai AutoEver debut AI-driven 3D navigation at CES 2025. Global leader in location technology.
news.summary: At CES 2025 in Las Vegas, on January 9, Mapbox and Hyundai AutoEver are presenting their latest in-car technologies. Mapbox, known for location technology, has partnered with Hyundai AutoEver, a software affiliate of Hyundai Motor Group. The collaboration introduces advanced AI voice-driven features to enhance the in-car experience. This unveiling marks a significant step in automotive innovation, combining the expertise of these two companies to create cutting-edge solutions for consumers.

news.headline: SmartSense by Digi tackles supply chain issues with VOYAGE™ solution, enhancing efficiency by 30%.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion people, with more than half residing in Asia. The report also highlights that over 1.1 billion people lack access to clean water, while almost 800 million people suffer from hunger. In terms of technology, there are currently 4.9 billion active internet users worldwide. Additionally, the report emphasizes that around 1.7 billion people do not have access to basic sanitation facilities, and approximately 750 million individuals are illiterate. Wealth inequality remains a significant issue, with the world's richest 1% owning over 44% of the world's wealth. The report further points out that the global economy has taken a hit due to the ongoing pandemic, with an estimated 255 million people projected to face extreme poverty by the end of the year. These statistics underscore the challenges facing the world today and the urgent need for global cooperation and sustainable development efforts.

news.headline: Ikea U.S. partners with National Sleep Foundation to improve sleep quality; 86% Americans seek better sleep, willing to give up activities.
news.summary: In a recent survey, it was found that a staggering 86% of Americans are unhappy with the quality of their sleep. To address this issue, IKEA U.S. has launched a new initiative aimed at improving sleep quality. Furthermore, the survey also revealed that a majority of individuals are willing to forego leisure activities in favor of a restful night's sleep. Today, in CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., IKEA U.S. unveiled their latest efforts to assist people in achieving better sleep.

news.headline: Amazon's Buy with Prime expands to Fossil.com, offering more selection for Prime members. #Amazon #Fossil #BuyWithPrime
news.summary: Amazon recently disclosed that Buy with Prime, a direct-to-customer (DTC) service, will extend to Fossil.com, a prominent global watch and accessories brand. This expansion will offer millions of Prime members in the U.S. access to a wider range of popular brands outside of Amazon's platform. Through Buy with Prime, Prime members can make purchases directly from numerous brands' online stores, leveraging the familiar shopping perks they enjoy. This move aims to enhance the shopping experience for Prime members by granting them access to a more extensive selection of products.

news.headline: 2025 Harley-Davidson Homecoming Festival in Milwaukee will feature Chris Stapleton and Hank Williams Jr. July 11. Ticket sales start Jan 17.
news.summary: Starting on January 17, 2025, tickets for the Harley-Davidson Homecoming® Festival in Milwaukee will be available for purchase. The event will feature performances by Chris Stapleton and Hank Williams Jr. at Veterans Park on July 11.

news.headline: Study shows 0.6 Tbsp honey equals sweetness of 1 Tbsp sugar, suggesting lower calories for same taste.
news.summary: A recent study funded by the National Honey Board, published in the Journal of Food Science, revealed that 0.6 tablespoons of honey is equivalent in sweetness to 1 tablespoon of table sugar. The sensory tests indicated that opting for honey over table sugar can offer the same level of sweetness perception. This finding suggests that using honey as a sugar substitute could be a beneficial choice. The study, conducted in ERIE, Colo., on January 9, 2025, highlights the potential advantages of incorporating honey as a sweetener, based on sensory evaluations.

news.headline: Saisei Ventures appoints Dr. Sven Kili, MD, as Partner; brings over 20 years of experience in biotechnology.
news.summary: A prominent investment firm in Japanese biotechnology and therapeutic innovations, Saisei Ventures, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed the appointment of Dr. Sven Kili as a partner. Dr. Kili has been associated with Saisei from the start as an advisor and offers a wealth of experience exceeding 20 years across clinical practice, pharmaceutical leadership, and entrepreneurial endeavors. With expertise in cell and gene therapy, Dr. Kili has significantly contributed to the advancement of this field and will now serve as a partner at Saisei Ventures.

news.headline: hoopla Digital partners with Creativebug to offer unlimited arts & crafts classes to public libraries users.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been revealed between hoopla and Creativebug in Holland, Ohio. This partnership offers users unrestricted entry to numerous arts and crafts courses hosted by specialists. Thousands of classes will be available through this new arrangement, providing users with a wide range of creative learning opportunities. This initiative aims to enhance the user experience and promote skill development in arts and crafts.

news.headline: Stephanie Trunzo named CEO of MERGE, a marketing and tech firm. Over 20 years experience. Joined board in 2024.
news.summary: MERGE, a reputable hybrid marketing and technology solutions company based in Chicago, has appointed Stephanie Trunzo as its new Chief Executive Officer. Trunzo, who previously held the position of Senior Vice President and General Manager at Oracle, has extensive experience in leadership across various sectors including technology, marketing, health, and storytelling. She joined MERGE's board in 2024 and is now set to lead the company's growth in the intersection of consumerism and health and wellness. Trunzo boasts over 20 years of experience in her field.

news.headline: Fed's Harker: The Fed must remain data dependent and not act with haste.
Quickbase receives perfect score of 100 on 2025 Corporate Equality Index, named Leader in LGBTQ+ Workplace Inclusion. 765 U.S. businesses honored.
news.summary: In Boston, Quickbase, an AI-powered work management platform, achieved a perfect score of 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2025 Corporate Equality Index, which is the primary survey assessing corporate LGBTQ+ workplace equality policies. Quickbase is among the 765 U.S. companies recognized with HRCF's Equality 100 Award for being Leaders in LGBTQ+ Workplace Inclusion. The 2025 CEI evaluated a total of 1,449 businesses nationwide.

news.headline: Hudson Pacific Properties (NYSE: HPP) will release Q4 financial results on Feb 20, 2025, with a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: LOS ANGELES - Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc. (NYSE: HPP), a leading real estate solutions provider for tech and media tenants, disclosed plans to unveil its fourth quarter financial outcomes post-market closure on Thursday, February 20, 2025. Subsequently, a conference call is scheduled at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results. Interested parties can participate in the call through a live audio webcast on the Investors segment of Hudson Pacific Properties' official website.

news.headline: RLTYco secures $20M in Series A funding, offers agents same-day commission advances and compliance services nationwide.
news.summary: RLTYco, a full-service provider for real estate professionals in New York, has recently secured a $20 million Series A funding round led by Altriarch. This investment allows real estate professionals across the country to access commission funding within 24 hours. RLTYco offers a range of services to simplify compliance and regulation processes for independent contractors.

news.headline: American Vanguard CEO Dak Kaye to participate in Lake Street Capital Investor Forum on Jan 16, 2025 at 11 a.m. Kaye brings 20+ years of executive experience.
news.summary: American Vanguard Corporation (NYSE:AVD) has disclosed that CEO Douglas “Dak” Kaye, III, will be engaging in an investor forum alongside Lake Street Capital analyst Ben Klieve on January 16, 2025, at 11 a.m. ET. This event marks Mr. Kaye's inaugural presentation to the financial community as the CEO of American Vanguard. With over 20 years of executive leadership background, Mr. Kaye has previously held roles such as North Ameri.

news.headline: Orbia named among top 200 companies with best reputations in Mexico by Merco Mexico ranking, analyzing 27 sources & 36,000 surveys.
news.summary: Mexico City-based Orbia Advance Corporation (BMV: ORBIA*) has recently been recognized in the 12th edition of the Merco México ranking, which showcases companies with the most stellar reputations in Mexico. This esteemed ranking evaluates 27 diverse information sources and feedback from more than 36,000 surveys to pinpoint companies excelling in leadership, ethics, social commitment, and innovation. Orbia is highlighted among the top companies in Mexico as per the Merco Mexico's comprehensive evaluation.

news.headline: Maximus plans Q1 earnings call for FY25 on Feb 6 in Tyson, VA; will release financial results.
news.summary: Maximus, based in Tysons, Virginia, has announced that it will hold its first quarter earnings call for the fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, February 6. The company will release its financial results on the same day.
